beats.narration: Finding particles is the easy half of magnetic particle testing. Deciding what they mean, interpretation, is the half that earns your certification.

payload.title: INTERPRETATION
payload.sub: From a cluster of particles to a correct call.

beats.narration: Every indication lands in one of three bins. False: no leakage field at all. Nonrelevant: real field, benign cause. Relevant: an actual discontinuity.
Prove the bin. Wipe and re-apply: a real indication returns. Demagnetize and re-test: magnetic writing won't. Check the drawing for geometry.

payload.heading: Prove it before you call it

beats.narration: Once it's relevant, shape testifies to depth. Sharp, dense, tightly held: a surface break. Broad, fuzzy, weak: the flaw sits below, and deeper means fuzzier.
Read the pattern, name the cause, then evaluate. Only relevant indications move forward; that call is what your certification is for.

payload.sub: Only relevant indications move to evaluation.
